name: phalanx-php/athena
description: AI agent runtime for Phalanx — providers, tools, streaming, structured output, multi-agent coordination

suggest.phalanx-php/redis: For conversation memory and pub/sub agent coordination
suggest.phalanx-php/hermes: For real-time agent sessions over WebSocket
suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: For Guzzle-based SDKs (AWS, Stripe) via CoroutineGuzzleStack
suggest.hyperf/guzzle: Coroutine-aware Guzzle handler so blocking SDKs cooperate with the OpenSwoole reactor
